texts.en: Our Father, who art in heaven, hallowed be thy name; thy kingdom come, thy will be done on earth as it is in heaven. Give us this day our daily bread, and forgive us our trespasses, as we forgive those who trespass against us; and lead us not into temptation, but deliver us from evil. Amen.
texts.sw: Baba yetu uliye mbinguni, jina lako litukuzwe; ufalme wako ufike, mapenzi yako yatimizwe duniani kama mbinguni. Utupe leo riziki yetu, utusamehe makosa yetu kama nasi tunavyowasamehe waliotukosea; usitutie majaribuni, lakini utuokoe maovuni. Amina.

texts.en: Hail Mary, full of grace, the Lord is with thee. Blessed art thou among women, and blessed is the fruit of thy womb, Jesus. Holy Mary, Mother of God, pray for us sinners, now and at the hour of our death. Amen.
texts.sw: Salamu Maria, umejaa neema, Bwana yu nawe. Umebarikiwa kuliko wanawake wote, na Yesu mzao wa tumbo lako amebarikiwa. Maria Mtakatifu, Mama wa Mungu, utuombee sisi wakosefu, sasa na saa ya kufa kwetu. Amina.

texts.en: Glory be to the Father, and to the Son, and to the Holy Spirit, as it was in the beginning, is now, and ever shall be, world without end. Amen.
texts.sw: Atukuzwe Baba, na Mwana, na Roho Mtakatifu, kama mwanzo, na sasa, na siku zote, hata milele. Amina.

texts.en: I believe in God, the Father almighty, Creator of heaven and earth, and in Jesus Christ, his only Son, our Lord. He was conceived by the Holy Spirit and born of the Virgin Mary.
texts.sw: Nasadiki kwa Mungu, Baba mwenyezi, Muumba mbingu na nchi; na kwa Yesu Kristo, Mwana wake wa pekee, Bwana wetu. Alitungwa kwa uwezo wa Roho Mtakatifu, akazaliwa na Bikira Maria.

texts.en: O Jesus, through the Immaculate Heart of Mary, I offer you my prayers, works, joys, and sufferings of this day for the intentions of your Sacred Heart.
texts.sw: Ee Yesu, kwa moyo safi wa Maria, ninakutolea sala, kazi, furaha, na mateso ya siku hii kwa nia ya Moyo wako Mtakatifu.

texts.en: Angel of God, my guardian dear, to whom God's love commits me here, ever this day be at my side, to light and guard, to rule and guide. Amen.
texts.sw: Malaika wa Mungu, mlinzi wangu mpendwa, ambaye upendo wa Mungu umeniweka chini yako, uwe karibu nami leo, uniangazie, unilinde, uniongoze. Amina.

texts.en: Lord, thank you for this day. Show me where I received your grace, where I failed to love, and how I may rest tonight in your mercy.
texts.sw: Bwana, asante kwa siku hii. Nionyeshe nilipopokea neema yako, niliposhindwa kupenda, na jinsi ninavyoweza kupumzika usiku huu katika huruma yako.

texts.en: Lord, make me an instrument of your peace. Where there is hatred, let me sow love; where there is injury, pardon; where there is doubt, faith.
texts.sw: Bwana, unifanye chombo cha amani yako. Palipo na chuki, nipande upendo; palipo na kosa, msamaha; palipo na shaka, imani.

texts.en: My God, I am sorry for my sins with all my heart. In choosing to do wrong and failing to do good, I have sinned against you whom I should love above all things.
texts.sw: Mungu wangu, ninajuta dhambi zangu kwa moyo wangu wote. Kwa kuchagua mabaya na kushindwa kutenda mema, nimekukosea wewe ninayepaswa kukupenda kuliko yote.

texts.en: Bless us, O Lord, and these thy gifts, which we are about to receive from thy bounty, through Christ our Lord. Amen.
texts.sw: Utubariki, ee Bwana, na vyakula hivi tunavyopokea kwa wema wako, kwa njia ya Kristo Bwana wetu. Amina.

texts.en: Loving Father, thank you for your gifts, your protection, and your mercy. Teach me to receive this day with humility and gratitude.
texts.sw: Baba mwenye upendo, asante kwa zawadi zako, ulinzi wako, na huruma yako. Nifundishe kuipokea siku hii kwa unyenyekevu na shukrani.

texts.en: Jesus, healer of body and soul, come close to me in weakness. Restore what is broken, strengthen my hope, and keep me in your peace.
texts.sw: Yesu, mponyaji wa mwili na roho, nikaribie katika udhaifu wangu. Rejesha kilichovunjika, imarisha tumaini langu, na uniweke katika amani yako.

texts.en: Lord, bless our family with patience, forgiveness, and unity. Let our home become a place of prayer, peace, and faithful love.
texts.sw: Bwana, ibariki familia yetu kwa uvumilivu, msamaha, na umoja. Nyumba yetu iwe mahali pa sala, amani, na upendo wa uaminifu.

texts.en: Soul of Christ, sanctify me. Body of Christ, save me. Blood of Christ, fill me with love. Water from the side of Christ, wash me.
texts.sw: Roho ya Kristo, unitakase. Mwili wa Kristo, uniokoe. Damu ya Kristo, unijaze upendo. Maji kutoka ubavuni mwa Kristo, unioshe.
